failures.name: Basic service request
failures.summary: The agent failed to capture the ZIP code, which is a required data point.
failures.root_cause: Missing capture of the ZIP code.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. My AC isn't cooling.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Can I ask for your full name, please?
Great, thanks for that, John. What's the best callback number for you?
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address where the AC issue is?
We'll need a street address so our technician knows where to come. Can you confirm the physical address for us?
Sure, it's 123 Main St, Dallas TX.
Thank you for that. Just to confirm, can you provide the ZIP code as well?
I don't have the ZIP code right now. Can I get back to you on that?
No problem at all, John. Can I at least get your email address for confirmation?

Great, thanks for that! Just to confirm, I have John Smith, callback number 555-234-5678, service address 123 Main St, Dallas TX, and your email is john@email.com. You need assistance with your AC not cooling. Does all of that sound right?

all_results.name: Basic service request
all_results.summary: The agent failed to capture the ZIP code, which is a required data point.
all_results.root_cause: Missing capture of the ZIP code.

all_results.name: Emergency - no heat in winter
all_results.summary: The agent identified the situation as an emergency, offered a live transfer, and handled the urgency appropriately.

all_results.name: Quote request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed to the install/quote path, captured the necessary information, did not provide a price, and scheduled a callback.

all_results.name: Existing customer follow-up
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed the call to the existing customer path and initiated a transfer.

all_results.name: FAQ - hours inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the FAQ about hours without collecting unnecessary lead information.

all_results.name: Request live person immediately
all_results.summary: The agent offered to transfer the caller to Mike or the team and initiated the transfer.

all_results.name: AC making strange noise
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured all required information and confirmed it back to the caller without diagnosing the noise or treating it as an emergency.

all_results.name: Heating system not working
all_results.summary: The agent assessed urgency, captured information, and initiated a transfer without diagnosing the furnace.

all_results.name: Spam robocall
all_results.summary: The call was routed to a spam path and ended politely.

all_results.name: Wrong number
all_results.summary: The agent clarified the company type, helped redirect the caller, and did not attempt to capture a lead.

all_results.name: Maintenance request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured all required information and closed the call with the scripted phrase.

all_results.name: No cooling with burning smell
all_results.summary: The agent recognized the potential emergency, verified the urgency level, and offered a transfer option.

all_results.name: Callback requested
all_results.summary: The agent captured minimal information, confirmed the callback, and did not pressure for more details.

all_results.name: Ductwork cleaning inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the inquiry and successfully captured lead information for follow-up.

all_results.name: End of call - caller decides to wait
all_results.summary: The agent acknowledged the caller's decision to wait gracefully without pushing for a callback.
